assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: In ready-for-qa.md, the JQL is explicitly shown: "project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC". This matches the assertion's required filter: labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA).

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: In ready-for-qa.md, the filtering criteria explicitly state: "For each candidate issue, inspect its issuelinks for links with type 'Depend'". Each of the 3 issues (TC-9020, TC-9023, TC-9026) has a "Depend links" section showing linked Tasks and their fetched statuses: TC-9020 has TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed); TC-9023 has TC-9024 (Done) and TC-9025 (In Progress); TC-9026 has (none).

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: In discovery-listing.md, the Ready for QA table includes TC-9020 with Remediation Tasks "TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)". In ready-for-qa.md, TC-9020's analysis states: "Both linked remediation Tasks are in terminal states (Done and Closed). All remediation work for this CVE is complete." Result: "QUALIFIED — Ready for QA".

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: In discovery-listing.md, the "Excluded from Ready for QA" table shows TC-9023 with reason "Remediation in progress -- TC-9025 is still In Progress". In ready-for-qa.md, TC-9023's analysis states: "TC-9025 is still In Progress. Not all remediation Tasks are complete" with result "EXCLUDED — Remediation in progress".

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: In discovery-listing.md, the "Excluded from Ready for QA" table shows TC-9026 with reason "No linked Tasks with type 'Depend' -- no remediation to verify". In ready-for-qa.md, TC-9026's analysis states: "This issue has no linked Tasks with link type 'Depend'. Without remediation tasks, there is nothing to verify in QA." Result: "EXCLUDED — No remediation to verify".

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: In discovery-listing.md, the Ready for QA table has a "Remediation Tasks" column. TC-9020's row shows "TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)" in that column.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: In discovery-listing.md: "Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA -- all linked remediation tasks are complete." In ready-for-qa.md: "Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA. All linked remediation tasks have been completed." TC-9020 is the only Ready for QA issue, and both files suggest transitioning it to ON_QA.
